title: The Mighty Architectury
description: Architectury port of The Mighty Architect. Design elaborate buildings within a minute!
body:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/4nHbxIu.gif)

# The Mighty Architectury
Architectury port of The Mighty Architect. Design elaborate buildings within a minute! 


Press **G** to get started!

### ORIGINAL MOD: [The Mighty Architect](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-mighty-architect)

From original description:

This client-side Tool allows you to quickly establish a building from a specified set of rooms and features. It decorates and surrounds the ground plan you draw with walls, towers, roofing and more. Afterwards you choose a material palette to be used in the final schematic produced.
